Subject: Missed Meeting and Follow-Up on Google Business Profile & Ads\n\nBody: Hi Temina, I hope you're doing well. We had our scheduled meeting today, but I noticed you weren't able to join. I also attempted to…
These are only free slots for Monday!
Anything between those I can book for you immediately. 20-30 mins slot should be enough!
Ok 4pm works. See you then
Can we please do Tuesday? I am so sorry.
No worries ill take 11
On Monday that slot is already booked by a client
Ok lets do 5pm
I am so sorry again!
Shall I book you for Tuesday?
Lets connect early on Monday or Tuesday, maybe?
Ok
Alright Temina. Will book that!
Oh, 6Pm will be very late for me!
Any other time Monday?
Tempean, I am really sorry but it looks like Monday won’t cut for us. This slot is also contradicting with a previous slot booked. I am so sorry!
Yes, Monday is good. Can we meet at 12 noon?
I am available from 4 to 5. From 5 I have a meeting already booked!
Let me know!
or 4pm to 5pm
No problem Tuesday is good. What tomes do you have
Yes, but it would be too early for you. Like 5am to  7am as per your time!
For Tuesday I have 8.30Am - 10.00Am and 11Am - 1 Pm
Ok. What the latest we can meet today. I can meet around 6pm
Yes can we meet Monday
We can connect today, little late towards afternoon or evening will work!
Or tomorrow
Greetings of the day!
Hello Temina
Hello Temina, Thanks for the update!
Btw, can we connect anytime soon?
I did it! You now have access
Go daddy is not letting me in. It keeps asking me for two verification code and keeps redirecting me back to sign in. I’ll figure it out tomorrow. Sorry I’ve been so busy with clients.

1. GoDaddy  Website: https://www.godaddy.com  Finding Delegate Access:  Log into your GoDaddy account  Navigate to your "Delegate Access" page (direct link available in dashboard)  In the "People who can access my accoun…

OK, thank you
Hello Temina, Good morning!
Please follow the below steps to proceed with domain transfer!
Once done, just let me know.
Hey Temina, I hope you are doing well

I mean, with your consent, we are capable of doing both.
You just let me know if you wanna keep your existing page which is flagged on the domain.
You want us to publish our landing page on your domain?
Your landing page. Or with everyone you think I should do you’re the expert LOL
So you want to keep the existing website on your domain or shall we replace it with ours?
Ok my domain is TempeanbeautyLA.com
i’m sorry I’m voice texting so that came out wrong. I meant to say “or whatever one you think I should choose.”
Yes, this is one.
Is this the landing page?

Nope, we dont need the log. You will receive a mail from Zoca consenting to Domain transfer and once you reply with a Yes to it, we will proceed and once done, you have to go to domain and allow our website to flag there…

￼ hey I want to change the domain name. Should I do that first and then publish?

We can connect on Monday, if you ca fine with it!

Hello Temina
There is nothing much you need to do. It’s us who needs to do and we just have to talk to you for the same. Its about Adds.
